security_proxy_summary.value: fresh masks reduce membership-style linkability (Δ AUC = +0.463 vs fixed_masks_fixed_u).

security_proxy_summary.value: Across true_ranks=[2, 4, 8] with dummy_strategy='paired_cancellation_dummy', the spectral rank inference risk is **needs_more_evaluation**.
Gradient-side spectral inference risk under the same dummy strategy is **high**.
Cross-layer linkage risk under multi-layer strategies is **high** (worst-case).
security_proxy_summary.recommendation: fresh masks per module + paired cancellation

security_proxy_summary.value: Worst spectral rank inference risk across strategies: **high**.
Worst gradient rank inference risk across strategies: **high**.
Worst cross-layer linkage risk across strategies: **low**.

direct_prior_work_comparison.threat_model_match: trusted controller + untrusted accelerator; proxy-evaluated, not formal
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: Under our proxy attackers and in our tested configurations the full bundle keeps the worst-case classifier near random chance.

direct_prior_work_comparison.threat_model_match: trusted controller + untrusted accelerator; proxy-evaluated, not formal
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: Same as the default full bundle but with the experimental opt-in inter_block_masked_boundary mode; reported as proxy-supported, not formal.

direct_prior_work_comparison.paper_name: Slalom: Fast, Verifiable and Private Execution of Neural Networks in Trusted Hardware (ICLR 2019)
direct_prior_work_comparison.threat_model_match: Slalom: trusted CPU + untrusted accelerator with Freivalds verification
direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: generation / KV append / LoRA training out of paper scope
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: We directly implement the Slalom delegated linear primitive and the Freivalds-style verification check.

direct_prior_work_comparison.paper_name: DarKnight: An Accelerated Framework for Privacy and Integrity Preserving Deep Learning (USENIX Security 2021)
direct_prior_work_comparison.threat_model_match: DarKnight: SGX + GPU coding scheme; semi-honest
direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: general k>=3 coding, integrity coding, and full SGX pipeline not reproduced
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: We directly implement the k=2 DarKnight additive-sharing skeleton over a linear layer.

direct_prior_work_comparison.paper_name: Amulet (matrix-obfuscation family); referenced as the static PHQ primitive
direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: A generic invertible left mask P_t does not commute with token-axis concatenation unless P_t is block-diagonal aligned with the prefix masks. Refreshing P per step therefore invalidates the existing masked cache and forces re-computation.
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: We directly implement the Amulet static PHQ identity and report the autoregressive KV-append counterexample.

direct_prior_work_comparison.paper_name: Arrow (nonlinear-primitive obfuscation; specific formula not available in repository materials)
direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: Arrow primitive is unavailable in this repository
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: The Arrow nonlinear primitive is not available in the repository materials; we record it as unavailable rather than substituting a proxy.

direct_prior_work_comparison.kv_append_result: unsupported: polynomial-only network has no KV cache
direct_prior_work_comparison.threat_model_match: CryptoNets: client-side HE; cloud sees ciphertexts (not modelled here)
direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: no HE library used; arithmetic skeleton only
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: We implement the CryptoNets x^2 polynomial-activation skeleton in plaintext; we do NOT implement the full cryptographic protocol.

direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: no executable cryptographic protocol implemented; cost dimensions only
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: GAZELLE (USENIX Security 2018) is included as a cost-model-only baseline; we do NOT execute its cryptographic protocol and we do NOT produce a measured runtime.

direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: no executable cryptographic protocol implemented; cost dimensions only
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: Delphi (USENIX Security 2020) is included as a cost-model-only baseline; we do NOT execute its cryptographic protocol and we do NOT produce a measured runtime.

direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: no executable cryptographic protocol implemented; cost dimensions only
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: SecureML (IEEE S&P 2017) is included as a cost-model-only baseline; we do NOT execute its cryptographic protocol and we do NOT produce a measured runtime.

direct_prior_work_comparison.unsupported_reason: no executable cryptographic protocol implemented; cost dimensions only
direct_prior_work_comparison.safe_paper_wording: MiniONN (CCS 2017) is included as a cost-model-only baseline; we do NOT execute its cryptographic protocol and we do NOT produce a measured runtime.

limitations: Pure aggregation; no new ops, no new attacks, no new probes.
Outputs are derived from existing outputs/*.json; if an upstream artifact is stale, the consolidated tables are stale.
LaTeX tables use plain tabular; large tables may need manual layout.
Figures are produced by run_paper_artifact_consolidation_figures (separate script); this module emits tables only.
Reports publish summary metrics + fingerprints only; raw tensors / masks / adapters / gradients / private data are never emitted.
No formal / cryptographic / semantic security is claimed.
No real TEE wall-time is claimed.
